testcase.name: test_redeploy_succeeds_and_preserves_env

skipped.message: Happy path triggers `git reset --hard` and overwrites uncommitted local changes. Set RUN_REDEPLOY_HAPPY_PATH=1 only when local == origin/main.

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_redeploy_webhook.py:64: Happy path triggers `git reset --hard` and overwrites uncommitted local changes. Set RUN_REDEPLOY_HAPPY_PATH=1 only when local == origin/main.

testcase.name: test_health_still_healthy_after_redeploy

skipped.message: Happy path triggers `git reset --hard` and overwrites uncommitted local changes. Set RUN_REDEPLOY_HAPPY_PATH=1 only when local == origin/main.
